editorsPick.title: Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga
editorsPick.summary: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter with Mad Max.
editorsPick.summaryEn: The origin story of renegade warrior Furiosa before her encounter with Mad Max.
editorsPick.reason: 视觉震撼的后末日史诗，Anya Taylor-Joy 演绎的 Furiosa 令人难忘
editorsPick.reasonEn: Visually stunning post-apocalyptic epic with Anya Taylor-Joy's unforgettable Furiosa

editorsPick.title: Dune: Part Two
editorsPick.summary: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to seek revenge against those who destroyed his family.
editorsPick.summaryEn: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to seek revenge against those who destroyed his family.
editorsPick.reason: Denis Villeneuve 的史诗续作，视觉与叙事双重巅峰
editorsPick.reasonEn: Denis Villeneuve's epic sequel reaches new heights in both visuals and storytelling

editorsPick.title: The Holdovers
editorsPick.summary: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break.
editorsPick.summaryEn: A curmudgeonly instructor at a New England prep school is forced to remain on campus during Christmas break.
editorsPick.reason: 温暖的圣诞电影，Paul Giamatti 的表演是最大亮点
editorsPick.reasonEn: A warm Christmas film with Paul Giamatti's standout performance

hiddenGem.title: Monster
hiddenGem.summary: A mother demands answers from a teacher when her son begins acting strangely.
hiddenGem.summaryEn: A mother demands answers from a teacher when her son begins acting strangely.
hiddenGem.reason: 是枝裕和的视角游戏，每个角度都揭示新的真相
hiddenGem.reasonEn: Hirokazu Kore-eda's perspective game where each angle reveals new truth

hiddenGem.title: Perfect Days
hiddenGem.summary: A janitor in Tokyo drives between jobs listening to rock music.
hiddenGem.summaryEn: A janitor in Tokyo drives between jobs listening to rock music.
hiddenGem.reason: 关于日常之美，Wim Wenders 最温柔的电影
hiddenGem.reasonEn: About the beauty of everyday life, Wenders' most tender film

mostAnticipated.title: Mickey 17
mostAnticipated.summary: An expendable employee is sent to colonize an ice world.
mostAnticipated.summaryEn: An expendable employee is sent to colonize an ice world.

familyChoice.title: Wild Robot
familyChoice.summary: A robot is shipwrecked on an uninhabited island and must learn to adapt.
familyChoice.summaryEn: A robot is shipwrecked on an uninhabited island and must learn to adapt.
familyChoice.whyWatchEn: DreamWorks' most heartwarming film of the year

sciFi.title: The Creator
sciFi.summary: In a future war between humans and AI, a former special forces agent is recruited to hunt down the Creator.
sciFi.summaryEn: In a future war between humans and AI, an ex-soldier is recruited to hunt the Creator.
sciFi.whyWatch: 惊艳的视觉设计和原创世界观
sciFi.whyWatchEn: Stunning visual design and original world-building

horror.title: Talk to Me
horror.summary: A group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand.
horror.summaryEn: A group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand.
horror.whyWatch: A24 出品的新世代恐怖经典

documentary.title: 20 Days in Mariupol
documentary.summary: Ukrainian journalists trapped in the besieged city of Mariupol document the atrocities of the Russian invasion.
documentary.summaryEn: Ukrainian journalists trapped in Mariupol document the Russian invasion.
documentary.whyWatch: 奥斯卡获奖纪录片的震撼现场记录
